title: malva subovata subsp. rupestris
intro: Malva subovata subsp. rupestris, also known as rock mallow, is a subspecies of the Malva subovata plant that belongs to the mallow family (Malvaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as digestive issues and skin problems. The health benefits of rock mallow include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing, due to its high content of mucilages and other bioactive compounds. Rock mallow can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions or taken as a dietary supplement to promote overall well-being.
